case_title: ISIDRO A. MEJIA VS. MANUEL JIMENEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-16-2013 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT TO SEP-12-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAS BEEN ASKED BY THE COURT TO BRING HIS OWN SPANISH INTERPRETER TO THE NEXT HEARING. DEFENDANT SHOWED UP IN COURT WITHOUT AN INTERPRETER, CASE CONTINUED. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ZAVIER MEJIA. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL C. LAW. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MEJIA, ISIDRO A. AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED JUL-18-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, MANUEL
